title: Allow solo-entrepreneurs to sign up to PRO
excerpt:
Description
I am a solo-entrepreneur and I LOVE Monday. I am trying to get myself up to be able to do my entire business workflow on Monday, but I honestly cannot afford the cost of 3 PRO licenses just to get the feature…

posts.author: samjtaylor (Sam)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

I am a solo-entrepreneur and I LOVE Monday. I am trying to get myself up to be able to do my entire business workflow on Monday, but I honestly cannot afford the cost of 3 PRO licenses just to get the features I need for myself. Surely there are others out there battling this battle as well? PLEASE allow us to purchase a single License, even as affiliates we should be able to do this, as the affiliate centre is restricting. Thank you!

What are you trying to achieve

I need access to the features that PRO provides, without having to pay for 3 Licenses. I am an affiliate but I want to run my business in my own Monday account, and cannot afford at this stage or anywhere in the near future to be able to pay for 3 licenses. Monday is holding me back from upscaling my business, because this is the only tool I want to use.
